_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Working within constraints (performance analyst) involves influence, challenge and coach others; anticipating how constraints might change and know where to challenge or remove constraints; demonstrate a very strong knowledge of security and data privacy; describe and work within environmental constraints, finding the most appropriate solution for users.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward selection, training, responsibility definition, and performance measurement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.429), SP-S-004 (SP, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.467). Shared vocabulary: [data, performance]. DDaT-only terms [analyst, anticipating, appropriate, challenge, change, coach] vs WIDAI-only terms [definition, designing, measurement, programs, responsibility, running] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.840, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 47-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (98.8%). The model interprets "Working within constraints (performance analyst) involves influence, challenge a" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward sele" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.452 ≈ STS 0.467 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, performance] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.8%. Shared tokens: [data, performance]. DDaT-only: [analyst, anticipating, appropriate, challenge, change, coach]. WIDAI-only: [definition, designing, measurement, programs, responsibility, running].
